mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement - Where your unrealistic demands become reality! 

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this: I stroll into a five-star restaurant, demand a table for one, and when they can't accommodate me immediately, I throw a full-blown tantrum, screaming about my importance and threatening to take my business elsewhere. The manager, clearly shaken by my display of power, scrambles to clear out the VIP section just for me. Ah, the perks of being Hot Josh, where I always get what I want because, well, I just deserve it.
